---
title: 'Resources | Suggestions'
date: '2018-02-28T00:17:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Discerning The Time'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6332935391282335534'
blogger_filename: '/p/resources.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Discerning The Time/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
Books and Such&nbsp;</h3>
The following are books, websites, ministries, authors, blogs, podcasts, videos (You Tube)&nbsp;and/or other material that I have found helpful in my End Times Prophecy, Last Days research. I'm no prophecy expert, but i am a prophecy student. I'm not interested in Hype or Mystery. I'm interested in truth. These are resources I've picked up along the way. The list will expand as I continue to study.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>*Affiliate Disclosure: I do make an affiliate commission from some of the links here, which means I make money if you buy something from that link. Primarily the amazon links. I only suggest things that I have found helpful in my study.&nbsp;</i></blockquote>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<h4>
Non Fiction Books:</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00FP6B4WW/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B00FP6B4WW&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Four Blood Moons: Something Is About to Change</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=B00FP6B4WW" height="1" style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; margin: 0px;" width="1" />, John Hagee</li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B005IYEQKI/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B005IYEQKI&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">The Harbinger: The Ancient Mystery that Holds the Secret of America's Future</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=B005IYEQKI" height="1" style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; margin: 0px;" width="1" />, Jonathan Cahn</li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1879503239/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=1879503239&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=2M4WNDCNUD3R2IG3">The Next Resurrection: You May Never Die - Hilton Sutton</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=1879503239" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" /></li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0736909885/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=0736909885&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=GKV62U5HHECYPQBN">Charting the End Times Prophecy Study Guide (Tim LaHaye Prophecy Library)</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=0736909885" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" /></li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B004KSPVY8/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B004KSPVY8&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=WCEXW7UUOBPEDVGC">Are We Living in the End Times? Time LaHaye &amp; Jerry Jenkins</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=B004KSPVY8" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" /></li>
</ul>
<br />
<h4>
Fiction Books:</h4>
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Left_Behind" target="_blank">Left Behind Series (What is it?)</a></li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00MGV8W06/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B00MGV8W06&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=HOGQFBAQR2PEF32Q">The Left Behind Collection - Time LaHaye &amp; Jerry Jenkins</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=B00MGV8W06" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" />&nbsp;(Amazon)</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<h4>
You Tube (And Other Videos):</h4>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Walid Shoebat - <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GtquNNEO7Fw" target="_blank">Mark of the Beast</a></li>
<li></li>
<li>Steve Quayle, David Lankford - <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z1-U0lIas34&amp;list=WL&amp;index=17&amp;t=3003s" target="_blank">The Days of Noah are Almost Upon Us Day 4</a></li>
<ul>
<li>Makes a compelling case for a MidTrib rapture. Worth reviewing.</li>
</ul>
<li></li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Audio/Teaching/Podcasts:</h4>
<div>
<br /></div>
<a href="http://gatewaypeople.com/" target="_blank">Gateway Church</a> - Southlake (Pastor Robert Morris) (<a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/gateway-church-audio-podcast/id88410531?mt=2" target="_blank">iTunes Link</a>)<br />
Below are iTunes Free Podcast Links<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/israel-at-a-tipping-point/id88410531?i=343348687&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Israel at a Tipping Point </a>- Jimmy Evans - 05/23/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/truth-at-a-tipping-point/id88410531?i=344172528&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Truth at a Tipping Point</a> - Jimmy Evans - 05/30/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/technology-at-a-tipping-point/id88410531?i=344573090&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Technology at a Tipping Point</a> - Jimmy Evans - 06/06/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/time-at-a-tipping-point/id88410531?i=345111712&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Time at a Tipping Point</a> - Jimmy Evans - 06/13/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/morality-at-a-tipping-point/id88410531?i=345576740&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Morality at a Tipping Point</a> - Jimmy Evans - 06/17/15</li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.gototherock.com/" target="_blank">The Rock Church</a> - Anaheim (Pastor Jerry Dirmann) (<a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/the-rock-jerry-dirmann/id160401421?mt=2" target="_blank">iTunesLink</a>)<br />
Below are iTunes Free Podcast Links<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/revelation-revolution-part/id160401421?i=346922497&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Revelation Revolution P1 - Jack Hayford</a>&nbsp;- 07/12/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/revelation-revolution-part/id160401421?i=347501504&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Revelation Revolution P2 - Jack Hayford</a>- 07/20/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/revelation-revolution-part/id160401421?i=348076052&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Revelation Revolution P3 - Jack Hayford</a> - 07/27/15</li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/revelation-revolution-part/id160401421?i=348644859&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Revelation Revolution P4 - Jack Hayford</a> - 08/03/15</li>
<li><b>Rock Conference 2015</b></li>
<li><a href="https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/answer-the-call-jerry-dirmann/id160401421?i=346946082&amp;mt=2" target="_blank">Answer The Call - Jerry Dirmann</a>&nbsp;- 07/13/15</li>
<li><br /></li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
End Times Teachers&nbsp;</h4>
(Anyone I've found interesting during my end times studies, regardless of how I feel about their other teachings, good or bad).<br />
<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.billyebrim.org/category/topic/end-times" target="_blank">Billye Brim</a></li>
<li><a href="http://hiltonsutton.org/index.php/about" target="_blank">Hilton Sutton</a></li>
<li><a href="http://www.jackhayford.org/about/" target="_blank">Jack Hayford</a></li>
<li><a href="http://shoebat.com/shoebat-foundation/who-is-walid/" target="_blank">Walid Shoebat</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.timlahaye.com/Home/Content/514" target="_blank">Tim LaHaye</a>&nbsp;&amp;&nbsp;<a href="http://jerry-jenkins.com/about/" target="_blank">Jerry Jenkins</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Websites:</h4>
<div>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.gotquestions.org/restrainer.html" target="_blank">Got Questions? What is the restrainer in 2 Thessalonians 2:6</a></li>
<li>Hebroots:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.hebroots.com/lul7_8.html" target="_blank">Genealogy from Adam to Jesus</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
Other:</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<h2 class="title">
16 CFR, Part 255 Disclosure</h2>
<div class="widget-content">
<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;">Disclosure of Material Connection: Some of the links in the post above are “affiliate links.” This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog. Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will add value to my readers. I am disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission’s </span><a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html" style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;" target="_blank"><span style="color: #333333;">16 CFR, Part 255</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;">: “Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.” A Big Thank You to </span><a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html" style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;" target="_blank"><span style="color: #333333;">Michael Hyatt</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;"> for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.</span> </div>
